'''Zelosian's Chine''' was an underwater mountain ridge situated amidst the [[Great Zelosi Sea]] on [[Zelos II]]. During the [[Day of the Sepulchral Night]], when the tides in the sea were at their lowest, the ridge would be exposed to the surface.<ref name="Sepulchral Night" />

In [[196 BBY]], a shipwrecked [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Prince/Legends|prince]] buried his treasure in caverns at the base of the seamount during one instance of the Day of the Sepulchral Night. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], during another such event, the bounty hunters [[Solum'ke]] and [[Diergu-Rea Duhnes'rd]] found the treasure, but were forced to abandon most of it when the cave began to refill with water and the beings who owned their charter betrayed them.<ref name="Sepulchral Night" />
